%%{init: {'theme':'base','themeVariables':{ 'primaryColor':'#ff8b00','edgeLabelBackground':'#ffffff','tertiaryColor':'#fef3c7'}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (C2-06 Local Hub / Federation)

[*] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (DDD EVT 60)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (P2P)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (DDD EVT 61)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [*]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [*] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为C2-06本地Hub与联邦同步的状态机建模。核心场景是：当本地Hub检测到与联邦状态不一致时，如何完成一次完整的同步流程。起点应该是DDD EVT 60触发SyncRequested事件。
明白了。那OUT_OF_SYNC状态需要标注具体的触发条件吗？比如stale CRDT frame、missing contributions这些？
对，把这些检测条件都放到右侧注释里。然后BeginSync触发后进入FETCH_REMOTE，这里要说明是通过P2P从联邦节点拉取最新的CRDT向量时钟和状态差异。
好的，FETCH_REMOTE到MERGE的转移我标注为FrameDownloaded。MERGE阶段需要描述CRDT合并函数和冲突解决逻辑吗？
需要，确保确定性收敛。MERGE完成后进入VALIDATE，这里要跑schema校验、hash完整性检查，还要验证远程Hub的签名。
验证通过后到SYNCED，用DDD EVT 61标记SyncConfirmed。但异常路径怎么处理？比如网络超时或者认证失败？
FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE这三个阶段都可能失败，统一汇聚到FAILED状态。然后RETRY状态处理重试调度，重试时回到OUT_OF_SYNC重新走流程。另外MERGE失败的一种特殊情况是ConflictUnresolved。
已添加。还有背景维护流程吗？比如定时同步或者参数变更？
对，SYNCED可以因为PeriodicSync或ParamChange回到OUT_OF_SYNC。另外加一个DEGRADED状态处理HubOffline或LatencyHigh的情况，这种严重故障直接EscalatedToOps结束。
确认一下：所有核心状态OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED都用橙色高亮，最终SYNCED和DEGRADED都能到达终止状态。这样SM-06.01 Hub Sync State就完整了。
